# ClaimAdvisor

> Free legal claim estimation tools for US residents. Informational only — not legal advice.

ClaimAdvisor provides three free calculators to help US residents understand the potential value of legal claims before consulting an attorney. All tools are anonymous and require no sign-up.

## Tools

- [Car Accident Settlement Estimator](https://www.claimadvisor.info/car-accident-calculator): Estimates settlement range using the multiplier method (medical bills + lost wages × injury severity multiplier, adjusted for fault percentage).
- [Workers Compensation Estimator](https://www.claimadvisor.info/workers-comp-calculator): Calculates weekly benefit (66.7% of average weekly wage, capped by state maximum) and total claim value based on weeks unable to work.
- [Mesothelioma Legal Eligibility Checker](https://www.claimadvisor.info/mesothelioma-eligibility): Score-based eligibility assessment for asbestos-related compensation claims through lawsuits or trust funds.

## Key facts

- All calculations are based on publicly documented legal formulas
- State-specific workers comp caps for California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Illinois
- Mesothelioma trust fund data: $30B+ currently available across US asbestos bankruptcy trusts
- No personal data collected or stored from calculator inputs
- Site complies with GDPR and CCPA; uses Google AdSense for advertising

## Pages

- [About](https://www.claimadvisor.info/about): Methodology, editorial standards, and organizational background
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.claimadvisor.info/privacy-policy): Data collection, cookies, Google AdSense disclosure
- [Terms of Use](https://www.claimadvisor.info/terms): Informational-only disclaimers
- [Contact](https://www.claimadvisor.info/contact): Editorial contact form
